blockingIssues.description: `src/components/review/TaskReviewDetail.vue` still derives `isReturnedTask`/`canResubmit` from stale `props.task` only, ignoring fresher canonical returned metadata loaded from workflow history. A returned task can therefore show the latest return reason while still hiding returned-state UI and the resubmit action, violating the detail contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow automated-only verification for test-only or non-UI contract features, and explicitly document the fallback when required seeded UI data is unavailable for browser validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `fup-m5-returned-contract-foundation` found the feature was test-only and reasonably verified with automated evidence, while the worker had to deviate because the current skill mandates agent-browser validation for every feature.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that repository `npm run lint` may be an auto-fixing command and workers should prefer a read-only lint invocation when the procedure requires no file mutation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The failing review for `fup-m5-returned-list-and-detail` noted the worker used `npm run lint`, but the skill requires a read-only lint step and the repo script is `eslint . --fix`.
